title: Cowboy Gun Set With Holster Kids
features: Single Children’s Cowboy Sheriff Accessories play set with 7 pieces for kids per order.

This fun costume accessory set includes everything you need for a wide range of Wild West costumes at fancy dress events such as Halloween, World Book Day celebrations, school costume days, themed costume parties and children’s imaginative play.
The convenient costume kit also makes a great gift or reward for birthdays and more.
The Cowboy Sheriff Set includes: 2x Plastic Toy Guns; 2x Holsters; 1x set bullets; 1x Gun Belt; 1x Silver Star Sheriff’s Badge.
description: Product description This Cowboy Sheriff set includes everything you need for accessorising a Wild West fancy dress costume and it is great for fancy dress parties, classroom book days and charity days, Halloween outfits, fun runs, school fêtes, cosplay events, and children’s imaginative play. Solve crime, protect the peace from gunslingers and troublemakers and wear the sheriff’s badge with pride. Just don’t forget to holster your pistols after use! The 7-piece costume kit includes: 2x Play Guns; 2x Holsters; 1x Set of Bullets; 1x Brown Gun Belt; and 1x Silver 5-Point Star Sheriff’s Badge. The twin cowboy guns measure 18cm / 7.1inch and fit snugly into their matching holsters, and the holsters can be securely fastened onto the included belt. The ammo set includes 3 bullets. Completing the set is the silver star sheriff badge, which measures 5.5cm and has a safety pin attachment to secure it to your outfit. Single Children’s Cowboy Sheriff Accessories play set with 7 pieces per order. Recommended for ages 3+. These fancy-dress costume accessories have been tested to EN71 and REACH regulations and are compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements. Safety Warning WARNING! Choking hazard, Small parts.
